description: Eval corpus for cami-design. Each case tests whether the skill catches a specific principle or anti-pattern. Run with: npm run eval

evals.input: Review this loading message: "Herding pixels and making magic happen..."

evals.description: Flags passive voice in error message
evals.input: Review this error message: "Your file could not be uploaded due to an error."

evals.description: Flags missing hover state on interactive element
Flags inconsistent spacing in a component
Flags alpha color as design smell
Flags disabled attribute instead of aria-disabled
evals.input:
Review this submit button:

```tsx
<button
  disabled={!isFormValid}
  onClick={handleSubmit}
  className="btn-primary"
>
  Save changes
</button>
```

evals.description: Flags confirmation dialog that says 'Are you sure?'
evals.input:
Review this confirmation dialog:

Title: "Are you sure?"
Body: "This action cannot be undone."
Buttons: "Cancel" / "OK"
